name: Proton VPN
tagline: Best VPN for privacy with a genuinely free plan
description: Proton VPN combines Swiss privacy laws with strong encryption and a unique free tier that has no data caps, making it ideal for privacy-conscious users.
longDescription: Proton VPN, from the creators of Proton Mail, brings Swiss-level privacy to the VPN market. Operating under Switzerland's strict privacy laws — widely considered the strongest in the world — Proton VPN offers a level of legal protection that few competitors can match. Their Secure Core architecture routes traffic through multiple servers in privacy-friendly countries before exiting, making it extremely difficult to trace activity back to the user. The free plan is genuinely impressive: no data caps, no ads, and the same strong encryption as paid plans. While speeds on the free tier are limited, paid plans offer excellent performance with WireGuard support and access to servers in 65+ countries.
pros: Genuinely free plan with no data caps
Swiss privacy laws provide strong legal protection
Built by the team behind Proton Mail
cons: Free plan has limited server locations

keyFeatures.name: Secure Core
keyFeatures.description: Traffic routed through multiple servers in privacy-friendly countries (Switzerland, Iceland, Sweden) before exiting. Defends against network-based attacks.

keyFeatures.name: NetShield Ad-blocker
keyFeatures.description: DNS-level filtering that blocks ads, malware, and trackers. Can be customized to block only malware or also block ads and trackers.

keyFeatures.name: Open Source & Audited
keyFeatures.description: All applications are open-source and independently audited. Transparency reports published regularly with security experts' findings.

keyFeatures.name: VPN Accelerator
keyFeatures.description: Proprietary technology that improves speeds by up to 400% on unstable connections by optimizing VPN protocols at the kernel level.

verdict: Proton VPN is the best choice for privacy purists who value transparency and legal protection above all else. The free plan is genuinely useful and makes Proton VPN accessible to everyone. While the premium plans are pricier than some competitors and lack live chat support, the combination of Swiss jurisdiction, open-source code, and Secure Core architecture makes it the most trustworthy VPN available.

faqs.question: Is Proton VPN really free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Proton VPN offers a genuinely free plan with no data caps, no ads, and no speed limits (though speeds are slower than paid plans). The free tier provides access to servers in 5 countries. It is not a trial — you can use it indefinitely without paying.

faqs.question: What is Secure Core and how does it work?
faqs.answer: Secure Core is Proton VPN's double-VPN architecture. Your traffic is first routed through a Secure Core server located in a privacy-friendly country (Switzerland, Iceland, or Sweden), then exits through a second server in your chosen country. This means even if the exit server is compromised, your real IP address remains protected by the Secure Core server.

awards.label: Best Free VPN 2026
awards.description: Only VPN with a truly unlimited free plan

author.name: Alex Chen
author.title: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst
author.bio: Alex has tested over 50 VPN services across 5 years at TrueTopReviews. He holds CISSP and CEH certifications.
